name: AI Spark MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing access to AI Spark (Xunfei/iFlytek Spark) — a leading Chinese large language model from iFlytek. Enables AI agents to use Spark's language model capabilities, including text generation, analysis, and understanding — particularly well-suited for Chinese-language AI tasks.
use_cases: Accessing iFlytek Spark LLM for Chinese-language text generation and analysis from AI agents
Building Chinese-language AI workflows using Spark's language model capabilities
Comparing Spark model outputs against other LLMs in multi-model agent pipelines
Integrating Spark's AI into enterprise workflows requiring China-compliant AI services
not_for: English-only workflows (Spark excels at Chinese but handles English too)
Teams preferring GPT-4, Claude, or other Western LLMs
Use cases requiring data to stay outside China (Spark processes data on iFlytek servers)
best_when: A team building Chinese-language AI applications needs access to iFlytek's Spark LLM — particularly for China-market products requiring a compliant Chinese AI service.
avoid_when: You need data residency outside China, or your use case doesn't benefit from a Chinese LLM specifically. Also: CN data residency concerns for regulated industries.

auth.notes: iFlytek Spark API credentials (API key + secret) required. Registration on iFlytek developer platform needed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Spark free tier: limited tokens/day for development
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid tiers for higher token limits and enterprise features
pricing.notes: iFlytek Spark has free API tier for developers. Production use requires paid plan.

performance.rate_limits: iFlytek Spark API rate limits by tier

known_agent_gotchas: iFlytek developer registration required — Chinese mobile phone number may be needed
Data processed on iFlytek/CN servers — review for data residency compliance
API documentation primarily in Chinese — international developers may face translation challenges
Community MCP server — not official iFlytek implementation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Data processed on iFlytek servers in China. CN data residency — review for GDPR/compliance requirements. API key for access.

security_score_components.security_notes: CN data residency — data on iFlytek servers. Review for GDPR compliance. API key required.
